description_long: This object is a slender, elongated electronic device with a tapered body and a fine, metallic tip, resembling a precision tool such as a soldering iron or engraving pen. The main body is cylindrical and appears to be made of black plastic or composite material, with a slightly textured surface for grip. The tip is metallic and narrow, likely designed for detailed work or contact with small components. There is a subtle seam or joint near the tip, suggesting a detachable or replaceable part. The rear end is rounded and may house a power connection or battery compartment. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on functionality and ease of handling.
description: A slim, black electronic tool with a fine metallic tip and a cylindrical, ergonomic body, likely used for precision tasks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow metallic tip and the tapered body leading to a rounded end.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, cylindrical shape and the fine, protruding tip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded end and the gradual tapering toward the tip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the side profile, emphasizing the length and slenderness of the device.
